examples: The long red sausage which goes into a hotdog is called Frankfurter.
It was named after frankfurter, a German food.
The 'twin tower' is called Frankfurter Tor and can be seen in the top left picture when magnified.
And Frankfurter Rundschau said he was the German "saviour in our hour of need".
"We want Germany to be our sherpa on this job training adventure, " he told Germany's Frankfurter Allgemeine newspaper.
